name: Uninsured employer after my Boise slip—what happens?
description: State fund covers you; boss gets penalized.[1]

mainEntity.name: Uninsured employer after my Boise slip—what happens?

acceptedAnswer.text: State fund covers you; boss gets penalized.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Idaho penalizes uninsured; you claim from state compensation fund.** Benefits same; employer fined.[1] Report to Industrial Commission. Lawyer enforces rare but serious violation.
